\tzpentry{ID4712}{Reassembled Kaluza-Klein Pi Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4712 introduces Reassembled Kaluza-Klein Pi Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\nf_n = \\frac{nc}{2\\pi R_\\text{KK}} \\sim n \\times 50 \\text{ GHz}\n\\end{equation}
